title: Create a 3D Model of a Product
scenario: Create a prompt that instructs an LLM to generate a high-quality 3D model of a product. The model should include detailed features, a clear and simple design, and a high-poly count. The output should be a 3D mesh file.
constraints: Must include a high-level description of the product
Must be under 100 MB file size
Must include a detailed product feature

evaluationCriteria.description: The accuracy and detail of the 3D model.
Whether the output file is compatible with common 3D modeling software.
Whether the output adheres to all specified constraints.
